form.name: Name
form.exprHelp:
Optional. A condition evaluated on top of the match above — BOTH must pass for the rule to apply.
Variables: w (1 = next turn likely writes / calls a tool, else 0) · t (predicted output tokens) · tokens (input prompt tokens) · group (key's group) · model (requested model).
Operators: == != < <= > >=  combine with && (and) || (or) ! (not) and ( ).
Note: using w or t invokes the small-model router classifier once per request; other variables add no latency.
form.targetGroup: Or target group (optional alternative to channels)

exprEx.write: next turn likely calls a tool / writes code
exprEx.longWrite: tool call AND a long predicted output
exprEx.vipOrWrite: VIP key, or any tool-call turn
exprEx.modelAndWrite: a specific model doing a tool call

validation.targetRequired: Select at least one target channel or a target group.

probe.title: Routing classifier (small-model probe)
probe.help: Routing expressions that use w or t need a classifier to predict them. Mock = built-in heuristic, no external call (good for trying rules). Real = POST each prediction to your HTTP proxy in front of the SageMaker endpoint.
